summary: Brief announcement of a foal named Raven born to Velvet, a mare used as a Cavallo hoof boot model, in Roberts Creek, BC, with an embedded YouTube video.
Promotes Carole Herder's podcast interviews on Horse Chats Australia, where she discusses her equine-industry experience and the creation of Cavallo Hoof Boots; links to episode 258.
Informational article on how extreme weather swings between heavy rain and dry heat affect horse hoof health, abscesses and cracks, with an embedded video.
Narrative piece imagining a wild horse herd's flight response, explaining the sympathetic nervous system as a 'hormonal gas pedal' and the role of the hoof in survival.
Explains the natural shock-absorbing engineering of the horse hoof, frog blood circulation, and why being barefoot and booted lets the hoof function as intended; includes a video.
Informational article on treating Navicular disease by keeping horses barefoot, with Cavallo Hoof Boots, gel pads and comfort pads supporting rehabilitation and circulation.
Detailed article on recognizing the subtle warning signs and causes of Navicular disease (Caudal Heel Pain), urging owners to address the cause rather than just symptoms.
Explains how Cavallo hoof boots' drainage slots handle autumn mud and water, with sizing/fit-test tips and an embedded Emma Massingale video showing the Trek Green boot underwater.
Promotes Carole Herder's Horse Chats Australia podcast episode 290 on the 10 most essential horse matters, with a YouTube link and a link to her earlier episode 258.
A thank-you post compiling heartfelt customer Facebook testimonials about how Cavallo Hoof Boots helped their horses, including a rescue horse named Pickles.
Event announcement that Hannah Pikkat and her mini Crunch will appear at Equitana Melbourne 2018 wearing Cavallo CLB Bling boots, plus mention of new Transport Air and Bling boots.
Customer success story from Allison McGinty (UK) about how Cavallo Hoof Boots helped her horse Apache recover from laminitis, with a video and a prompt to share your own story.
